allow: PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 92000 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; $p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { "Puerto 3000 OCUPADO por PID $\($p.OwningProcess\)" } else { "Puerto 3000 LIBRE" })

PowerShell($p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { Stop-Process -Id $p.OwningProcess -Force }; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force ".next" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \(Test-Path ".next"\) { ".next AUN EXISTE" } else { ".next borrado OK" })
